message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "JobManager" as JobManager
participant "Nodes" as Nodes
participant "ESDM" as ESDM
participant "Post Processing Library" as PostProcessingLibrary
database "Storage" as Storage

User -> JobManager: submit_job(IN, OUT)
activate JobManager
JobManager -> Nodes: 
activate Nodes

box "Initialization" #LightGrey
    Nodes -> Storage: read IN=x
    activate Storage
    Storage --> Nodes: return
    deactivate Storage
endbox

box "Loop" #White
    Nodes -> Nodes: compute
    Nodes -> ESDM: write async OUT=y
    activate ESDM
    ESDM -> Storage: write snapshot (async)
    
    box "In Situ Post Processing" #White
        ESDM -> PostProcessingLibrary: trigger post processing if region effected
        activate PostProcessingLibrary
        PostProcessingLibrary -> PostProcessingLibrary: perform post processing
        PostProcessingLibrary -> Storage: (could write result directly)
        PostProcessingLibrary --> ESDM: return
        deactivate PostProcessingLibrary
    endbox
    
    ESDM -> Storage: write post processing result
    ESDM --> Nodes: return
    deactivate ESDM
endbox

Nodes --> User: OUT files become visible
deactivate Nodes
deactivate JobManager

note right of Nodes: multiple iterations

box "Finalize" #LightGrey
endbox

Storage --> User: All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

@enduml
```
